Payload.description:
Generic outbound audit record / envelope.

Records an outbound network request made by a package through Ygg-provided network/request helpers. This is a kernel event payload — it does NOT contain raw secrets, bodies, headers, prompts, or responses. Only `secret_ref` identifiers and the `redaction_state` are recorded.

capability_id.description: Capability through which the request was made.

error.description: Error message if status is not "allowed".

package_id.description: Package that owns the outbound request.

principal.description: The principal that initiated the request.

purpose.description: Declared purpose from the manifest or request context.

redaction_state.description: Redaction state — what data, if any, was recorded.

Payload.title: OutboundAuditRecord

RedactionState.description:
Redaction state for an outbound audit record.

Every outbound request carries one of these states to indicate whether raw body/header/prompt/response data was preserved. The default is `NotCaptured` — raw data is never saved unless explicitly approved.

oneOf.description: Raw data was redacted before recording.
Only a policy reference is stored; no data captured.
Request was blocked as unsafe; no data recorded.
Explicit user/host approval to capture raw data (rare).

description: Payload schema for event kind kernel/v1/outbound.denied.
title: kernel/v1/outbound.denied
